input.oldString:
<Button
                variant="ghost"
                size="sm"
                onClick={async () => {
                  console.log('Disconnect clicked, current state:', { isConnected, address })
                  wagmiDisconnect()
                  
                  await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500))
                  
                  console.log('After disconnect:', { isConnected, address })
                  
                  if (isConnected) {
                    toast.info('Wallet managed by Farcaster - reconnect to switch accounts')
                    handleConnect()
                  } else {
                    toast.success('Wallet disconnected')
                  }
                }}
                className="h-7 text-xs px-2"
              >
                {address?.slice(0, 6)}...{address?.slice(-4)}
              </Button>
input.newString:
<Button
                variant="ghost"
                size="sm"
                onClick={async () => {
                  const connectorName = connector?.name || 'Unknown'
                  console.log('Disconnect clicked:', { connectorName, isConnected, address })
                  
                  if (connectorName === 'Farcaster Miniapp') {
                    toast.info('Farcaster wallet cannot be disconnected. Refresh to reconnect.')
                    return
                  }
                  
                  wagmiDisconnect()
                  toast.success('Wallet disconnected')
                }}
                className="h-7 text-xs px-2"
              >
                {address?.slice(0, 6)}...{address?.slice(-4)}
              </Button>
